pages.title: Sayf Zaim Jun 12 2026
pages.body:
# Sayf x Zaim — Jun 12, 2026

**From:** Sayf Codes <sayfcodes@gmail.com>
**Date:** Fri, 12 Jun 2026 12:00:46 +0800
**Source:** email forward + calendar acceptance
**Source URI:** gmail://19eb6b5d19465acd

**Sayf's note:** From my meeting with Zaim this morning.

## Calendar Details

- **Scheduled:** Fri, 12 Jun 2026, 10:30am – 11:00am (MYT)
- **Status:** Accepted by Sayf
- **Google Meet:** https://meet.google.com/udx-niaz-esr
- **Phone (US):** +1 402-588-0161, PIN: 507016250

[Source: Calendar acceptance email, 2026-06-11]

---

## Summary

Discussion explored AI skepticism and market strategy alongside technical collaboration opportunities for business growth.

### Differing AI Market Perspectives

[[Sayf]] and [[Zaim Mohzani|Zaim]] debated the value of AI in business, contrasting skepticism about automation hype with the practical utility of AI for basic skills training.

### Technical Tools and Infrastructure

Discussion shifted toward specific software tools, noting the efficiency of virtual private servers and the potential of data integration dashboards for business applications.

### Collaboration and Service Models

Agreement reached to build a technical solution for coaching services while prioritizing simple, revenue-focused strategies for future client engagement for [[Maloha Coast]].

## Suggested Next Steps

- **[Maloha Coast]** Build Dashboard: Arrange a meeting to build the dashboard component. Perform the session either in person or over a call based on the preference of Zaim Mohzani.
- **[Zaim Mohzani]** Provide Testimonial: Provide a testimonial in exchange for the assistance provided by Maloha Coast.
- **[Maloha Coast]** Share Research Link: Send the Tencent Lighthouse promotion link for further research.
- **[The group]** Schedule Followup Session: Coordinate a time for a meeting to continue the discussion.
- **[Zaim Mohzani]** Send WhatsApp Message: Contact Maloha Coast via the provided phone number to initiate further communication.

## Google Doc

https://docs.google.com/document/d/1q3v6SbKF_PiEaTatPNvhZtoWd9T_n9v5HqMoxsLj3hQ/edit?usp=meet_tnfm_email

pages.title: Zaim Mohzani
pages.body:
# Zaim Mohzani

> **Role:** AI & Career Strategist | ASEAN Policy Specialist | Senior Director at KSI
> **Location:** Federal Territory of Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia
> **LinkedIn:** https://my.linkedin.com/in/zaimmohzani
> **Website:** www.zaim.my
> **1st-degree connection with sayf** [Source: User, LinkedIn, 2026-06-09]

---

## Compilation of Facts (Compiled Truth)

Zaim Mohzani is a Malaysian career strategist, ASEAN policy specialist, and social entrepreneur. He helps mid-career professionals change careers without starting over, using a lifestyle-centric career design approach. He has directly helped 2,600+ professionals in Malaysia since 2015. [Source: LinkedIn profile, 2026-06-09]

He is Malaysia's first certified Designing Your Life (DYL) coach, trained by Bill Burnett and Dave Evans at Stanford University. [Source: LinkedIn profile, 2026-06-09]

### Core Philosophy: Lifestyle-Centric Career Design

Zaim's approach rejects the "follow your passion" advice. Instead:
- Start with the lifestyle you actually want
- Work backwards to careers that support it
- Build skills with market value
- Make moves based on reality, not feelings

His key thesis: **Passion is a by-product of doing good work, not a prerequisite.** [Source: LinkedIn About section, 2026-06-09]

### Personal Story

At 25, Zaim had strong credentials but was burnt out — hundreds of applications, zero offers. He was told "you just haven't found your passion yet." That advice kept him paralysed. He pivoted through five industries and at 28 became chairman of a Malaysian government agency — not because he found his calling, but because he stopped chasing passion and started designing for the life he wanted. [Source: LinkedIn About section, 2026-06-09]

---

## Current Roles (as of June 2026)

| Role | Organization | Since | Type |
|------|-------------|-------|------|
| AI & Career Strategist | [[Nation Building School]] | Jan 2024 | Full-time |
| Principal | Nation Building School | Aug 2015 - Dec 2023 | Previous role |
| Senior Director of External Relations | [[KSI Strategic Institute for Asia Pacific]] | Jan 2024 | Full-time |
| Director of External Relations | KSI Strategic Institute for Asia Pacific | Nov 2020 - Dec 2023 | Previous role |
| Co-Chair | [[Inclusive AI Association]] (IAIA) | Aug 2025 | Volunteer |
| Advisor | Asia House (London) | Oct 2020 - Feb 2023 | Seasonal |

[Source: LinkedIn profile, 2026-06-09]

---

## Education

- **MSc in International Strategy & Diplomacy (Distinction)** — London School of Economics and Political Science (LSE), 2019-2020. Chevening Scholar. Dissertation: "Disrupted by AI? Impact of AI on the U.S-China Arms Dynamics."
- **BA in Political Science and Government** — Monash University, 2010-2013

[Source: LinkedIn profile, 2026-06-09]

---

## Key Certifications

- **Designing Your Life Certified Coach** — Stanford University (via DYL), issued Jul 2023
- **AI For Good** — AI Singapore, issued Sep 2025
- AI Trainer (UK), ChatGPT Prompt Specialist (Singapore), ChatGPT Expert (India)

[Source: LinkedIn profile, 2026-06-09]

---

## Major Awards & Recognitions

- Best Perdana Fellow Award (2023)
- Dalai Lama Fellows (2022)
- Youth Advisor to Prime Minister of Malaysia (PM2PM, 2021)
- British Council Future Leaders Connect (2021)
- Acumen Academy Fellowship Malaysia (2021)
- Queen Elizabeth Prize for Engineering Ambassador (2020)
- Founding Chairman, Impact Malaysia / Impact Integrated (2018)
- The Edge Inspiring Young Leaders Awards (2019)
- U.S. Department of State YSEALI Professional Fellowship — ACYPL (2018)
- ASEAN Youth Fellowship (2018)
- Associate Fellowship, Royal Commonwealth Society (2017)
- NGO/Youth Advisor — ACTYVATE/Blue Ocean Youth Movement, Ministry of Finance Malaysia (2017)
- Advisory Chair, AIESEC in Malaysia (2017)
- Community Ambassador, Impact Hub Malaysia (2016)
- Selected for World Economic Forum Global Shapers
- Asia Society Asia 21 Next Generation Fellow
- New York Southeast Asia Network (NYSEAN) member

[Source: LinkedIn profile + KSI speaker page + web search, 2026-06-09]

---

## Organizations Founded / Led

### [[Nation Building School]] (est. Aug 2015)
Social enterprise started as a bootstrapped NGO in Bukit Tunku, now empowering next-generation leaders. Has engaged over 10,000 youths in Malaysia and Southeast Asia. Focus: career workshops and leadership programmes for urban poor, single mothers, and youth at risk. During the pandemic, launched virtual career workshops. [Source: LinkedIn profile, 2026-06-09]

### Impact Integrated (est. Dec 2018)
Founding Chairman. Government agency under Malaysian Ministry of Youth and Sports. Oversaw transformation from "reputationally controversial" to sustainable and impactful. Strengthened corporate governance. Notable project: #BeliaBerkeja (Youth Working) Virtual Career Fair. Engaged 10,000+ youths. Served until Feb 2023. [Source: LinkedIn profile + KSI speaker page, 2026-06-09]

### KSI Visiting Fellowship
Founded the KSI Visiting Fellowship programme, bringing in 10+ regional experts to strengthen policy and research at KSI. [Source: LinkedIn profile, 2026-06-09]

### KSI Academy
Leads KSI Academy, delivering AI training programmes for corporations across ASEAN. [Source: LinkedIn profile, 2026-06-09]

### KSInsights
Built KSInsights into a regional platform, publishing 30+ articles on ASEAN, technology, and geopolitics. [Source: LinkedIn profile, 2026-06-09]

### [[Inclusive AI Association]] (IAIA)
Co-Chair since Aug 2025. Community-based NGO dedicated to making Malaysians AI-Literate (MAIL) by 2030. Focus areas:
- **Inform:** Public awareness campaigns and simple AI explainers
- **Contribute:** Platforms for citizen feedback on AI policy
- **Educate:** Workshops and training aligned with National Guidelines on AI Governance and Ethics and ASEAN AI Safety Network

[Source: LinkedIn profile, 2026-06-09]

### ASEAN Economic Club & World Digital Chamber
Leads these KSI initiatives to drive regional economic and digital cooperation. Engages Prime Ministers, Presidents, and senior policymakers across ASEAN. [Source: LinkedIn profile, 2026-06-09]

### Chevening Alumni Malaysia
President (Sep 2020 - Apr 2022). Achievements:
- Increased membership 60% (133 to 222)
- Established Chevening Alumni Southeast Asian Network (CASEAN)
- Organised inaugural CAM Summit 2022
- Created four CAM Interest Network Groups (CAMINGs)
- Youth Mentorship Programme: 592 mentors mentoring 160+ youths
- Supported hundreds of Chevening applicants

[Source: LinkedIn profile, 2026-06-09]

### YSEALI Council of Malaysia (YCOM)
Founder and Chair. Among the first YSEALI alumni associations in the region. [Source: KSI speaker page, 2026-06-09]

---

## What He Offers (Products / Services)

1. **90-Day Career Change Programme** — Helps mid-career professionals choose careers they actually want without starting over or chasing passion. [Source: LinkedIn About, 2026-06-09]
2. **Free Monthly Career Clarity Workshop** — Next: 1 July 2026 (Wednesday), 9:00-10:30 PM GMT+8/MYT, via Zoom. Register at https://t.ly/getclearoncareer6 [Source: LinkedIn Featured, 2026-06-09]
3. **Free Guide: "Find Your Next Career Move in 30 Minutes (Without Starting Over)"** — Available at https://www.nationbuildingschool.com/ [Source: LinkedIn Featured + website, 2026-06-09]
4. **AI Training for Non-Technical Professionals** — Hands-on training on applying tools like ChatGPT without needing to code. [Source: LinkedIn Experience, 2026-06-09]

---

## Networks & Affiliations

- World Economic Forum Global Shapers
- Asia Society Asia 21 Next Generation Fellow
- New York Southeast Asia Network (NYSEAN)
- Global Muslim Business Forum (speaker)
- Royal Commonwealth Society (Associate Fellow)
- Perdana Fellows Alumni Association (Founding President, Sep 2013 - Nov 2014)
- Toastmasters International (May 2013 - Jun 2014)

[Source: LinkedIn profile + web search + KSI speaker page, 2026-06-09]

---

## Audience & Reach

- **8,838 LinkedIn followers** (as of June 2026)
- **500+ connections**
- **52 mutual connections** with sayf (including Sara Radziah, Divya Adinarayanan)
- Active LinkedIn content creator — posts regularly on career strategy, workplace dynamics, and Malaysian professional life
- Recent viral-style post (June 2026): story about an admin assistant running a side business from her office desk, getting caught by colleagues, Industrial Court dismissal — used as a teachable moment about workplace visibility

[Source: LinkedIn profile, 2026-06-09]

---

## Relevance to Maloha Coast

sayf identified Zaim as a **pitch target** for Friday (June 2026). Key angles:
- Zaim runs AI literacy training for non-technical professionals — complementary to Maloha Coast's AI consulting services
- His Inclusive AI Association (IAIA) is building Malaysia's AI literacy ecosystem — potential partnership or client
- KSI Academy delivers AI training to ASEAN corporations — potential B2B channel
- Zaim is a connector across ASEAN policy, business, and youth ecosystems
- His career design methodology (DYL/Stanford) could integrate with AI upskilling offerings
- sayf has 52 mutual connections with Zaim, including Sara Radziah and Divya Adinarayanan

[Source: User, 2026-06-09]

---

## Languages

- English: Native or bilingual proficiency
- Malay: Native or bilingual proficiency

[Source: LinkedIn profile, 2026-06-09]
